misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Wait a minute!! The Holy Knights can't regenerate their bodies while they're separated?? Please, Oda, I beg you, go with the Hidan route. All the mf Holy Knights should be buried forever in dirt, never to see sunlight...

misc.title: No wonder he calls it worst world cup... 🫣😂 The Touchline | 𝐓 (@TouchlineX) 🚨🗣️ 𝗡𝗘𝗪: Wayne Rooney: "You are not getting a WORSE World Cup than South Africa in 2010. That tournament NEVER felt
misc.text: No wonder he calls it worst world cup... 🫣😂 The Touchline | 𝐓 (@TouchlineX) 🚨🗣️ 𝗡𝗘𝗪: Wayne Rooney: "You are not getting a WORSE World Cup than South Africa in 2010. That tournament NEVER felt like a World Cup." — @WeAreTheOverlap — https://nitter.net/TouchlineX/status/2034606809088971258#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 I'm getting rooftop vibes; I feel Oda is going all out with this fight. He's really put a lot of work into this setup. After centuries of fighting, Imu, Nidhogg, and Nika are finally fac
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 I'm getting rooftop vibes; I feel Oda is going all out with this fight. He's really put a lot of work into this setup. After centuries of fighting, Imu, Nidhogg, and Nika are finally facing off. Guys, Chapter 1178 is going to be phenomenal, I can feel it...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 I know many people have really high expectations for Usopp in this arc, and I also hope this wasn't the end of it for him. But I thought the scene and Usopp's actions were very well done
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 I know many people have really high expectations for Usopp in this arc, and I also hope this wasn't the end of it for him. But I thought the scene and Usopp's actions were very well done; standing up to Imu like that shows a lot of courage, praying for more🙏

misc.title: 《＃貸会場》 本日より「ONE PIECE 熊本復興プロジェクト10年展」が始まりました✨開会式には、木村県知事もご来場😆 入場無料ですが、事前予約が必要です❣️ お問い合わせは、熊本県観光振興課まで→096−333−2158 特設ページ（予約） op-kumamoto.com/op10y/ 会期：2026/3/20〜5/24

misc.title: いろんなこと思い出して途中涙も溢れたけど、熊本に尾田先生という強い味方がいて、麦わらの一味がきてくれて、本当に良かったと思いました。早かったようで長かった10年。これからも頑張ろう熊本。 #ONEPIECE熊本復興プロジェクト10年展
